change_reason: Second-pass audit cleanup applied to remove template hazards and strengthen Stage 1 validation guardrails before pre-run plan completion.
notes: Stage 0 remains PASSED. Stage 1 remains IN_PROGRESS and is not complete until EXP001 pre-run plan is filled, human-approved, and logged.

research_question: Do 2-meter temperature forecast-observation residuals from HRRR show repeatable associations with predefined terrain/elevation/land-cover classes across five Oregon ASOS/METAR-network stations during a locked 90-day summer 2024 window (2024-06-01 through 2024-08-30, end-exclusive)?
geographic_region: Oregon, USA. Multi-terrain transect: coastal low-elevation (AST), Willamette Valley (SLE), interior southern valley (MFR), mountain/pass (SXT), central high desert (RDM).

station_list.station_name: Rogue Valley International / Medford / Jackson County

station_selection_filter_criteria: Metadata-only: active Oregon ASOS/METAR-network stations with long public archives covering full study window, >=90% usable observations expected after QC, coverage spanning coastal/valley/interior-valley/mountain-pass/high-desert terrain classes, publicly documented metadata. No residuals, forecast errors, or mismatch behavior inspected.
forecast_source: NOAA/NCEP HRRR CONUS 3-km grid. Version and cycle documented at data access time. Model-cycle changes require stratification.
observation_source: NOAA/NCEI ASOS/AWOS hourly METAR. Primary archive: IEM ASOS or NCEI LCD/DSI-3505.
land_cover_source: NLCD 2021 or most recent. MODIS MCD12Q1 as logged fallback.
time_alignment_rule: Nearest observation within +-10 minutes of HRRR valid time; closest timestamp if multiple qualify; missing if none; no imputation for validation/test.
spatial_alignment_rule: Primary: nearest HRRR 3-km grid point. Sensitivity: bilinear if practical. Flag elevation mismatch >50 m.
qc_policy: Exclude bad/missing flags, null/impossible temperature, duplicate timestamps, parsing failures. Require >=90% usable hourly observations per station. No imputation for validation/test. Flag flatlining >=6 hours.
train_validation_test_split: Temporal only. Train days 1-60 (2024-06-01 to 2024-07-30). Validation days 61-75 (2024-07-31 to 2024-08-14). Locked test days 76-90 (2024-08-15 to 2024-08-29). Baselines trained on train window only.

baselines.description: Raw HRRR 2-meter temperature with no correction.
Station-specific mean signed residual on train window.
Mean signed residual by station x lead time x time-of-day bin on train window. Strongest baseline.

primary_metric_and_threshold.threshold: All three simultaneously: >=10% absolute residual magnitude separation; Cohen's d >= 0.2; BH-adjusted p <= 0.05.

supported_thresholds: All nine conditions required. No correction or operational claims in v0.
minimum_sample_floor: >=1000 matched rows total; >=150 per tested group.
allowed_analyses: Two families: terrain/elevation-conditioned and land-cover-conditioned residual magnitude comparison on locked test set.
sensitivity_checks: Six checks: time-alignment +-5 min; bilinear vs nearest-grid-point; leave-one-station-out x5; baseline-comparison stability; time-of-day stratification; month stratification June/July/August.
rigorous_stability_metric_definition: N=5. Stable if direction same in >=4 of 5 LOSO checks AND magnitude does not collapse below 50% in more than one check.
proxy_risk_screening_criteria: Eight categories: airport microenvironment; elevation mismatch >50m; coastal exposure; mountain/pass representativeness; land-cover mismatch; missing-data concentration; model-cycle issues; QC inconsistencies.
notes: EXP001 first MRDE v0 pilot. Metadata-only station selection. No residuals inspected. No correction or operational claims. Approved by explicit operator message at 2026-04-28T05:44:17Z.
Stage 2 data pipeline artifacts completed. Elevation metadata captured via EPQS. NLCD land cover deferred for EXP001 v0 (D005). SXT flagged for proxy risk.

details: Stage 3 pipeline successfully aligned 43,090 HRRR rows, constrained to the strict valid_time window. Baseline metrics generated using strict train split only. SXT proxy risk and NLCD deferral preserved.
